name: Coffee-Toffee Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the frozen pound cake into 1-inch slices and halve each slice diagonally to create triangular pieces.
2. Line the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan with the cake pieces, filling in any gaps by cutting some slices into smaller pieces.
3. Spread half of the coffee ice cream over the cake layers.
4. Freeze until firm for about 1 hour.
5. Spread half of the hot fudge topping over the ice cream and sprinkle with half of the crushed Heath bars.
6. Repeat layering with remaining cake, ice cream, fudge topping, and candy.
7. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and freeze until the ice cream is set.
8. Before serving, remove the pan sides.
9. Place the cake on a platter.
10. Spread some whipped cream on the sides of the cake.
11. Pipe rosettes of cream around the edge of the cake.
12. Serves 8-10.
